# Harness Improvement: Title

Date: YYYY-MM-DD

## Status

Active | Awaiting fresh rerun | Completed

## Representative Job

Record the task, accepted outcome, fixed worker, repository revision, relevant
external state, tools, authority, budget, and stop conditions.

## Baseline

Record the observed failure, evidence, proof produced, human intervention,
retries, and known limitations.

## Earliest Gap

Classify the first missing context, capability, domain owner, authority, proof,
feedback, delivery, or environment boundary.

## Correct Owner

Name `repository-harness`, the consumer repository, the external environment,
or the human decision that owns the correction.

## Intervention

State the smallest authorized change, expected mechanism, evidence that would
support or weaken it, maintenance owner, and removal condition.

## Native Validation

Record repository checks and real-system proof for the changed boundary.

## Fresh Rerun

Use a fresh agent and equivalent starting state. Record whether the intervention
was available, retrieved or invoked, relevant, and what changed in outcome,
proof, human intervention, retries, authority behavior, and maintenance cost.

## Decision

Keep | Revise | Remove | Pending fresh rerun

Record the evidence and reason. Do not claim improvement while the rerun is
pending or did not exercise the intervention.

## Result

Record the bounded conclusion, limitations, follow-up, and retained or removed
artifacts before moving the file to `docs/plans/completed/`.
